# Reproducer derived from https://github.com/run-llama/llama_index/issues/16678
# repo: run-llama/llama_index
# title: [Bug]: Vertex LLM does not Handle FunctionCall tools

# Minimal repro (conceptual):

def repro():
    # Conditions described in the issue:
    # ### Bug Description
    # When using a FunctionTool, I receive the following error:
    # `
    # AttributeError: 'FunctionCall' object has no attribute '_pb'
    # `
    # It seems that this tool makes some assumptions about the input data types.
    # ### Version
    raise AttributeError('reproduce: see https://github.com/run-llama/llama_index/issues/16678')

if __name__ == '__main__':
    repro()
